channel.title: T261 shrdlu Source B
channel.description: T261 URL-first cross-source dedupe E2E fixture source B.

item.title: T261 shared URL story from source B
item.description: Source B carries the same canonical URL with a different source-local GUID.

item.title: T261 source B same GUID unique URL
item.description: Source B reuses source A's GUID string, but this is a distinct canonical URL.
